name: Pa'O
notes: Pa'O (Pa-O Karen) of Myanmar, written in the Mon–Burmese (Myanmar) script, an abugida. The grapheme inventory is NOT yet specified: no consonant/vowel-sign → IPA mapping is claimed here. A correct spec requires the full Myanmar-script akshara model (consonant letters with an inherent vowel, dependent vowel signs, medials, the virama/asat, and the Pa'O-specific tone letters) plus a documented Pa'O phoneme inventory; that research has not been done. Metadata only.
